mapper.sql: select id, user_id, order_id, open_id, amount, `type`, status, token, `time`, remark, belongers_open_id, order_status from zhs_commission_flow
mapper.insert:
insert into zhs_commission_flow
user_id, order_id, open_id, amount, `type`, status, token, `time`, remark, belongers_open_id, order_status,
#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{openId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{status}, #{token}, #{time}, #{remark}, #{belongersOpenId}, #{orderStatus},
mapper.delete:
delete from zhs_commission_flow where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update zhs_commission_flow f left join zhs_order o on f.order_id = o.id set o.status = 6 ,o.payment_status = 3 ,f.`status` = 1 where
#{id}
